description: Environment setup - install dependencies and verify baseline tests pass
steps: Run pip install -r requirements.txt -r requirements-dev.txt to install all dependencies
Run pytest tests/ to verify all existing tests pass
Run cdk synth to verify the stack synthesizes cleanly
acceptance_criteria: All existing tests in tests/unit/ pass without errors
cdk synth produces valid CloudFormation output
verification: cdk synth produces CdkBaseStack.template.json without errors
findings: All 91 tests pass. NODE_OPTIONS env var must be unset before running pytest or cdk synth because it references a non-existent preload script. Python 3.9 is used (not 3.11 as documented). cdk synth works via npx aws-cdk synth.
